docket_entries.description: MEMORANDUM OF POINTS AND AUTHORITIES ISO PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD (TRANSACTION ID # 78961344) FILED BY PETITIONER AGARWAL, SAURABH

LAW AND MOTION 301, PETITIONER'S PETITION TO CONFIRM CONTRACTUAL ARBITRATION AWARD AND ENTER JUDGMENT. NO APPEARANCES. THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING: GRANTED. SEE MINUTES FOR THE COURT'S COMPLETE RULING. A PROPOSED ORDER AND A PROPOSED JUDGMENT ARE SUBMITTED FOR REVIEW. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN, CLERK: E. LARNAUTI, NOT REPORTED

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Contractual Arbitration Award And Enter Judgment
Off Calendar Jun-09-2026 Text Ruling

Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Contractual Arbitration Award And Enter Judgment
Off Calendar May-20-2026 Continued To Jun-09-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 301
MINI MINUTES: PETITIONER SAURABH AGARWAL'S PETITION TO CONFIRM CONTRACTUAL ARBITRATION AWARD AND ENTER JUDGMENT

No appearances. The court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: Saurabh Agarwal's petition to confirm arbitration award is continued on the court's own motion to June 9, 2026. Respondent may submit a sur-reply of no more than 10 pages to address new evidence presented with petitioner's reply brief by June 1, 2026. Judge: Christine Van Aken, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported (301/CVA)
